title: GCP SM module doc: add Zeroization section documenting remaining gaps
description: After the pzq.3 fix, gcp-sm get and put no longer use serde_json::Value. But the remaining gaps are undocumented: (1) reqwest response buffer (not zeroed - unavoidable), (2) put request body Vec<u8> containing base64-encoded secret (not zeroed - unavoidable given reqwest API). Vault has a # Zeroization section listing these explicitly; gcp-sm should match so contributors know the zeroization boundary. Without the doc, a contributor seeing Zeroizing<String> for encoded but plain Vec<u8> for body will wonder if they should fix it.
